raw_transcript: That's exactly why you're here. Heavy NSAID use is one of the leading causes of peptic ulcers because it strips the protective lining of the stomach. We also need to check for a bacteria called Helicobacter pylori.
final_corrected_note: That's exactly why you're here. Heavy NSAID use is one of the leading causes of peptic ulcers because it strips the protective lining of the stomach. We also need to check for a bacteria called Helicobacter pylori.
